pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 21; Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 10+ namespaces (jakarta.*), so using javax.* causes compile errors or missing class runtime exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new Jakarta/Spring Boot 3 stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is part of the legacy javax namespace which is deprecated/removed in favor of jakarta.annotation in modern stacks; keeping it may cause conflicts or is simply unnecessary if the codebase has migrated to Jakarta annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for Java 21 release targets, leading to build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo to a version that supports Java 21 bytecode instrumentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions do not support Java 21 class files, causing runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate code correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update javax.annotation-api version property (likely for cleanup or if still referenced elsewhere, though the dependency was removed).
Update jaxb-api version property to a newer release.
Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
Upgrade commons-codec to a newer snapshot version.
